summary: HR Module Staging Validation - Password Reset and Numeric Input Fix. All features tested and verified working. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend UI: All features validated through Playwright.

password_reset_ceo.details: CEO (kalyan@wisedrive.com) can reset any employee's password via POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/reset-password

password_reset_hr_manager.details: HR Manager (hr@wisedrive.com) can reset any employee's password. Lock icon button visible in ACTIONS column.

password_reset_modal.details: Modal shows employee info (name, email), password input with 6 char min validation, Reset Password button enabled when valid.

password_reset_rbac.details: Finance Manager correctly denied password reset (403 Forbidden). Only CEO and HR_MANAGER roles can reset passwords.

password_min_length_validation.details: Password < 6 characters returns 400 error with message 'Password must be at least 6 characters'

numeric_input_fix_absent_days.details: Absent Days in payroll preview - typing '12' when value is '0' results in '12' not '012'. NumericInput component clears '0' on focus.

numeric_input_fix_working_days.details: Working Days in payroll header - editable input works correctly.

numeric_input_fix_other_deductions.details: Other Deductions in payroll preview - typing '1000' when value is '0' results in '1000' not '01000'.

login_credentials.details: All credentials working: kalyan@wisedrive.com (CEO), hr@wisedrive.com (HR Manager), finance@wisedrive.com (Finance Manager) - all with password123

employee_list_lock_icon.details: Employee list shows Lock icon for password reset in ACTIONS column. 5 employees visible with reset buttons.

payroll_preview_salary_calculations.details: John Sales: ₹50,500 gross, Mike Mechanic: ₹40,500 gross. Salary calculations update in real-time when editing Absent Days or Other Deductions.

hr_module_tabs.details: All tabs accessible: Employees, Attendance, Payroll, Leave, Roles, Countries

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employees: John Sales, Mike Mechanic, Kalyan, HR Manager, Finance Manager
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Module staging validation complete. Key features verified: 1) Password reset for HR/CEO via Lock icon button, 2) NumericInput component fix - clears '0' on focus so typing '12' shows '12' not '012', 3) All login credentials working, 4) Payroll preview with editable Absent Days and Other Deductions columns, 5) Real-time salary recalculation.
